productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual White Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the cool and casual thinkers, this canvas shoe from playboy oozes confidence, style and comfort. Slip into these hi-ankle shoes and seize the day with much ease, while the fabric upper keeps you fresh and comfortable and the stylish lugs on the outsole enhance your fashion statement. Upper denim upper for easy maintenance and durability High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and for style Carbon rubber toe box and foxing for enhanced protection to the forefoot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Metallic eyelets on the lateral forefoot for enhanced ventilation Brand logo printed on the lateral side of the foot for absolute style Midsole Cushioned insole with a fabric footbed for all-day sweat-free comfort Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole in white for flexibility and traction in style Brand logo-shaped lugs throughout the outsole for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
